学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 104th, rated as average, with low short video exposure; no records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively average strength in advantageous disciplines.
In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Provincial General College Entrance Examination is about 521,000, an increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (History Category 97,088 + Physics Category 260,587 = 357,675); based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72.9%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 379,809, an increase of about 46% from 260,587 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 46% in provincial Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continuous rise in the Soft Science ranking of the university, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 51945; the predicted minimum ranking is about 51845, with a range of 51345–52345.
